message:
style(packages): format ParsedSource::Git destructuring across separate
lines and add explanatory comment for clone_source derivation

Break multi-field destructuring patterns onto separate lines for rustfmt
compliance in install_source() and update_all(). Add a doc comment
explaining why git_clone_source() is called from parse_git_source()
rather than at each use site.

No logic changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
